zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Margaret Keeble於1637年6月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特時，她的父親George Alexander Keeble28歲，母親Mary Susannah Whitby20歲。她於1666年3月與Major Robert Beverley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年6月28日在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年41歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Margaret Keeble于1637年6月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特时，她的父亲George Alexander Keeble28岁，母亲Mary Susannah Whitby20岁。她于1666年3月与Major Robert Beverley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年6月28日在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年41岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其。

nameMeanings.name: Keeble
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): nickname from Middle English kibble ‘cudgel’, perhaps for someone who used or made cudgels or whose physique resembled one.
Americanized form of South German Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘tub, vat’.

variants.name: Kibble
meanings: Altered form of German Kibbel or Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘vat’, from Latin cupella ‘drinking vessel, grain measure’. Compare Kibler .

variants.name: Kibel
meanings: German: unrounded form of Kübel, a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, from Middle High German kübel ‘vat, tub’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Margaret Keeble was born on 3 June 1637, in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, George Alexander Keeble, was 28 and her mother, Mary Susannah Whitby, was 20. She married Major Robert Beverley in March 1666, in Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 28 June 1678, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, United States, at the age of 41, and was buried in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Margaret Keeble est née le 3 juin 1637, à Gloucester, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Alexander Keeble, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Susannah Whitby, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Major Robert Beverley en mars 1666, à Lancaster, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1678, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Margaret Keeble am 3. Juni 1637 in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Alexander Keeble 28 und ihre Mutter Mary Susannah Whitby 20. Sie hat im März 1666 in Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America Major Robert Beverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Juni 1678 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Margaret Keeble è nata il il 3 giugno 1637 nel Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, George Alexander Keeble, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mary Susannah Whitby, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Major Robert Beverley nel marzo 1666, nel Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 giugno 1678, nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Keebleが1637年6月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州グロウセスターで生まれた時，父George Alexander Keebleは28歳，母Mary Susannah Whitbyは20歳であった。1666年3月にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ランカスターでMajor Robert Beverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年6月28日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチで41歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Keeble(이)가 1637년 6월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Alexander Keeble(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Susannah Whitby(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1666년 3월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 랭커스터에서 Major Robert Beverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 6월 28일 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Margaret Keeble nasceu em 3 de junho de 1637, em Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Alexander Keeble, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Susannah Whitby, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Major Robert Beverley em março de 1666, em Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1678, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Margaret Keeble родилась 3 июня 1637 г. в местности глоусестир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Alexander Keeble было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Susannah Whitby, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Major Robert Beverley марта 1666 г. в местности ланкастир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 28 июня 1678 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Margaret Keeble nació el 3 de junio de 1637, en Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, George Alexander Keeble, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Susannah Whitby, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Major Robert Beverley en marzo de 1666, en Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de junio de 1678, en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.
